competency_groups.title: Equilibrium Competencies
competency_groups.description: Competencies derived from the Equilibrium chapter covering dynamic equilibrium, thermodynamic relationships, and factors affecting equilibria.
competencies: Analyze dynamic equilibrium in physical and chemical processes
Relate reaction quotient (Q), equilibrium constant (K), and Gibbs energy to predict spontaneity
Evaluate the impact of external factors on chemical equilibria

competency_groups.title: Redox Reactions Competencies
competency_groups.description: Competencies derived from the Redox Reactions chapter focusing on electron transfer and oxidation states.
competencies: Identify redox reactions based on electron transfer mechanisms
Determine oxidation numbers to balance chemical equations
Explain electrode processes in electrochemical cells

competency_groups.title: Organic Chemistry Principles Competencies
competency_groups.description: Competencies derived from the Organic Chemistry chapter covering nomenclature, isomerism, and reaction mechanisms.
competencies: Classify organic compounds and apply IUPAC nomenclature rules
Distinguish between different types of isomers in organic structures
Analyze fundamental concepts underlying organic reaction mechanisms
competency_groups.unit_name: Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques

competency_groups.title: Hydrocarbons Competencies
competency_groups.description: Competencies derived from the Hydrocarbons chapter addressing classification, properties of aromatic compounds, and safety.
competencies: Differentiate between alkanes, alkenes, and alkynes based on structure and reactivity
Assess carcinogenicity and toxicity associated with specific hydrocarbon classes
